Michigan.note: L.J. Cason torn ACL (Feb 27), key guard out for season

Alabama.note: Aden Holloway suspended indefinitely (felony arrest Mar 16), top 3pt shooter (16.8 PPG, 43.1% 3PT)

North Carolina.note: Caleb Wilson broken thumb (Mar 5), best player out (19.8 PPG, 9.4 RPG). Vegas has UNC -2.5 vs VCU suggesting market prices injury at ~-3.5, but we believe impact is larger.

BYU.note: Richie Saunders torn ACL (Feb 15), went 4-6 since injury. Dybantsa can carry but depth suffers.

Duke.note: Caleb Foster broken foot (out). Ngongba PROBABLE for Thursday — Scheyer says 'very positive', took good step with medical staff. Override reduced from -2.0 to -1.0. Revert to -2.0 if Ngongba ruled out Thursday morning.

Gonzaga.note: Braden Huff dislocated kneecap (Jan 15), confirmed out opening weekend per Mark Few. Jogging and shooting — possible Sweet 16 return with full week off.

Texas Tech.note: JT Toppin torn ACL (Feb 17). Was averaging 21.8 PPG, 10.8 RPG on 54.8% — All-American caliber. Committee dropped them from projected 3-seed to 5-seed. Christian Anderson (groin) cleared to play.

Louisville.note: Mikel Brown Jr. questionable (lower back), missed last 4 games + entire ACC tournament. Projected lottery pick with 45-point game vs NC State. Monitor game-day status — reduce to -1.5 if he plays limited minutes.

Clemson.note: Carter Welling torn ACL (Mar 12 ACC Tournament). Second-leading scorer (10.2 PPG) and top rebounder (5.4 RPG). Very recent — KenPom hasn't fully adjusted.

_vegas_calibration_note: As of Mar 18, our injury overrides are ~2-4 pts more aggressive than Vegas lines for UNC, Alabama, Gonzaga, and BYU. This may partially double-count since KenPom season-long ratings already reflect recent games without injured players. Duke's override aligns perfectly with Vegas after the -2.0 to -1.0 reduction. For x Seed scoring, being more aggressive on injury-affected games creates more upset picks, which is strategically desirable.
